## Change Description
<!-- What does this PR change? -->

## Category
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Strategy parameter change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Infrastructure

## For parameter/strategy changes — Fix #101 four-eyes governance
- [ ] Backtest result attached (minimum: Sharpe, PF, win rate, max drawdown)
- [ ] Backtest covers at least 3 months of walk-forward data
- [ ] OOS performance verified (not just IS)
- [ ] Second reviewer approved (required for live parameter changes)

## Backtest Summary (required for strategy/param changes)
| Metric | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Sharpe | | |
| Profit Factor | | |
| Win Rate | | |
| Max Drawdown | | |
